Plays all EVERCADE cartridges and works with over 700 officially licensed retro and indie games. It also has features such as vertical screen mode and ``EVERSYNC'', which allows multiplayer with just one software.

entries.title: 「スレスパ」でデッキ構築ローグライクにハマった？　ならば今こそ「Monster Train 2」で遊ぶのじゃ！【放課後れびゅあーず！】

entries.description: An unprecedented deck-building roguelike boom has arrived! Or rather, is "SlaytheSpire2" too popular? As if to tell you to ride this big wave, "MonsterTrain2" was introduced on "After School Reviews!". This game, which incorporates elements of tower defense, seems like it's easy to overdo it when the deck is spinning...?

The world tour that will be held in each country will be carried out in accordance with the characteristics of the local Xbox community and region.

entries.description: Today's "Hobonichi Indie PickUp!" introduces the Metroidvania "Solateria" where you can enjoy exhilarating parry-centered battles. If you deflect an enemy's attack at the right time, a slow motion will occur, and by inputting additional input, you can unleash a powerful counterattack. In a world ravaged by a shadow plague, a small fire warrior embarks on a journey to find the missing king.

This work is a cooperative survival simulation game set on the International Space Station (ISS). The player becomes a crew member of the ISS and aims to survive in a world without gravity.

entries.title: 「Fishbowl」本日配信。大人としての責任や過去の傷を抱える女性が，魔法の魚とともに未来へと歩み出す，心温まるアドベンチャーゲーム

entries.description: WholesomeGamesPresents started distributing "Fishbowl" today. This is an ADV game that depicts the growth story of Aro, a woman who moves to a new city after her grandmother's death. She works as a video editor from home and lives her life worrying about her responsibilities and past wounds. A heartwarming story unfolds in which a magical talking fish unravels the past and moves towards a new future.

entries.description: LEGO Japan will release seven soccer-themed products from the LEGO Edition series.

entries.title: ［インタビュー］“WWEスーパースター”ASUKA選手に聞く，「WWE 2K26」の魅力。WWEにおける自身の10年の振り返りも
entries.title_ja: ［インタビュー］“WWEスーパースター”ASUKA選手に聞く，「WWE 2K26」の魅力。WWEにおける自身の10年の振り返りも
entries.description: ``WWE2K26'' is a professional wrestling action game released by 2K. We present an interview with ASUKA, who appears in this work and has been a leader in WWE's women's division as a Japanese superstar. We asked the player, who is also a hardcore gamer, to talk about the amazing reproducibility and appeal of this work, as well as his 10-year journey with WWE.

entries.title: オリジナル版「バイオハザード」1〜3がSteamで配信開始。名作ホラーの原点となる3作をPCで手軽に遊べるように
entries.title_ja: オリジナル版「バイオハザード」1〜3がSteamで配信開始。名作ホラーの原点となる3作をPCで手軽に遊べるように
entries.description: Capcom today (April 2, 2026) released the survival horror games ``BIOHAZARD (1996),'' ``BIOHAZARD 2 (1998),'' and ``BIOHAZARD 3 LASTESCAPE (1999)'' on Steam. It is the third title in the "Resident Evil" series from the first, and is currently on sale for 50% off.

entries.title: タコが主人公のアクションADV「Darwin's Paradox!」，本日リリース。タコならではの能力を生かし，ステージごとのギミックを突破しよう
entries.title_ja: タコが主人公のアクションADV「Darwin's Paradox!」，本日リリース。タコならではの能力を生かし，ステージごとのギミックを突破しよう
entries.description: KONAMI today released "Darwin's Paradox!" developed by ZDTStudio. This is an action-adventure game where you control an octopus named Darwin who was kidnapped by a UFO and fights against an alien conspiracy. Utilize the unique abilities of an octopus, such as mimicry, blindness, and movement using suction cups, to overcome the gimmicks of each stage.

entries.title: NES用新作メトロイドヴァニア「Annalog」，クラファンを実施中。「メトロイド」「ゼルダの伝説」やプログラミング系論理パズル好きにオススメ
entries.title_ja: NES用新作メトロイドヴァニア「Annalog」，クラファンを実施中。「メトロイド」「ゼルダの伝説」やプログラミング系論理パズル好きにオススメ
entries.description: The new Metroidvania ``Annalog'' for the NES (Overseas Famicom) is currently undergoing crowdfunding on Kickstarter. The player takes on the role of a young girl who explores a post-apocalyptic monochrome world while creating a path by actually programming machines such as bulkheads and lifts that can be found in various places by combining commands and parameters.

entries.title: 発行部数3000万部を超える人気小説「龍族」を原作とする新作「ドラゴンブラッド：スレイヤーズ学院」，本日より事前登録受付を開始
entries.title_ja: 発行部数3000万部を超える人気小説「龍族」を原作とする新作「ドラゴンブラッド：スレイヤーズ学院」，本日より事前登録受付を開始
entries.description: ARCHOSAURGAMES today (April 2, 2026) began accepting pre-registrations for the new title "Dragon Blood: Slayers Academy." The story is based on the popular novel ``Ryuzoku,'' which has sold over 30 million copies, and depicts the fate that flows between humans and dragons.

entries.title: 「『アイカツ！シリーズ』オーケストラコンサート『オケカツ！』2026 -Anniversary Baton-」，特典CDの収録内容と演奏曲を追加公開。チケット一般発売は4月4日スタート

entries.description: Aetas, BANDAI NAMCO Pictures, and BANDAI NAMCO Music Live have released additional information on the bonus CD and songs scheduled to be performed for the "Aikatsu! Series" Orchestra Concert "Okekatsu!" 2026-Anniversary Baton-, which will be held on May 4, 2026. Advance tickets will go on sale from 10:00 on April 4th.

entries.title: Switch2/Switch版「魔王城ものがたり」，4月9日配信開始。モンスターを育成し，罠を配置して侵入してくる冒険者たちを迎え撃つダンジョン経営シム
entries.title_ja: Switch2/Switch版「魔王城ものがたり」，4月9日配信開始。モンスターを育成し，罠を配置して侵入してくる冒険者たちを迎え撃つダンジョン経営シム
entries.description: Kairosoft has announced that distribution of the Switch 2/Switch version of ``Maoujo Monogatari'' will begin on April 9, 2026. The player becomes the lord of an abandoned castle in the frontier, welcomes unique monsters, and fights off invading adventurers. In addition to expanding the display range and improving graphics, the Switch 2 version supports 4K resolution and mouse operation.

entries.title: 映画「ザ・スーパーマリオギャラクシー・ムービー」，日本語版をいち早く見られるプレミアム試写会を4月21日に開催。参加者を募集中

entries.description: Toho Towa announced today (April 2, 2026) that it will hold a "Japanese version premium preview" at a certain location in Tokyo on the evening of April 21 to commemorate the release of the movie "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie," and has also started accepting applications for participation. In addition, scene photos have been released that allow you to see characters such as Mario, Yoshi, and Bowser.

entries.title: ［プレイレポ］スタイリッシュな動きと多彩なビルドが生む爽快コンボバトル。新作横スクロールアクション「SlashZero」プレイテストで見えてきたこと
entries.title_ja: ［プレイレポ］スタイリッシュな動きと多彩なビルドが生む爽快コンボバトル。新作横スクロールアクション「SlashZero」プレイテストで見えてきたこと
entries.description: Playtesting for Streetlamp Studio's new title ``SlashZero'' began on March 27, 2026. Featuring a cyberpunk worldview and anime-style graphics, this is an ambitious work that combines fast-paced combat and roguelike elements. In this article, we will introduce its appeal based on about 5 hours of play.

entries.title: 全DLCを収録した「Atomic Heart: Ultimate Edition」，PS5パッケージ版を6月25日に発売。架空のソ連を舞台にしたアクションRPG
entries.title_ja: 全DLCを収録した「Atomic Heart: Ultimate Edition」，PS5パッケージ版を6月25日に発売。架空のソ連を舞台にしたアクションRPG
entries.description: 4Divinity and BeepJapan today announced that the PS5 packaged version of "AtomicHeart: Ultimate Edition" will be released on June 25th, and has started accepting reservations. ``AtomicHeart'' is a single-player action RPG set in the ``Soviet Union,'' which has a history different from reality. This is a complete version that includes all DLC in the main game.

entries.title: CS衛星劇場，「影技 SHADOW SKILL」など16作品を4月に放送。「VHSを巻き戻せ！俺たちのOVA特集」でバトル＆ファンタジー作品を特集

entries.description: CS Satellite Theater is currently broadcasting an OVA titled ``Rewind the VHS! Our OVA Special''. April 2026 features "Battle & Fantasy" works that make you feel the overwhelming heat and momentum of 90's OVAs. ``Kagegi SHADOWSKILL'', which is based on Mei Okada's manga, will air the first and second OVA seasons, as well as an extra edition, on April 11th.

entries.title: 「ヒプノシスマイク -Alternative Rap Battle- 2nd period」，ゲームシステムや追加要素などが確認できるプロモーションムービーを公開

entries.description: Idea Factory today released a promotional movie for the Switch software ``Hypnosis Mic - Alternative Rap Battle - 2nd period''. This work is the second software for Switch that includes the content of the smartphone game ``Hypnosis Mic -Alternative Rap Battle-''.

entries.title: 人間が綴り，描いた物語と，AI生成された物語が並行する異色のビジュアルノベル「EULA」，6月26日にSteamでリリース

entries.description: MoEater announced on April 1, 2026 that the new title ``EULA'' will be released on Steam on June 26, and released the store page. This work is a multi-ending visual novel that allows you to switch between ``illustrations and text created by humans'' and ``illustrations and text generated by AI'' during the game.

entries.title: ホームレスが愛犬と共に無人島生活に挑む。ゴミに覆われた島に再び命を吹き込むスローライフ型シム「Restore Your Island」，2026年4月9日に発売

entries.description: Mikio Igarashi's ``Bonobono'' will celebrate its 40th serialization anniversary in 2026, and the TV anime's 10th anniversary. The commemorative site ``40 years with Bonobono.'' pre-opened on April 2nd, the day the anime first aired in 2016. The anime's 10th anniversary illustration has been released.

Many manga artists will also participate.

On the Court'" based on the anime "Haikyu!!" based on the original work by Haruichi Furudate will be held at Dojima River Forum in Osaka from June 27th to August 2nd and at Bellesalle Roppongi in Tokyo from August 7th to September 13th. Ipri Bazurium Park is a shop that opened to commemorate the start of the new series ``Onegai Ipri.'' At the back of the store, there is a large display of ``Iprix Runway.''

This work is the latest work in the ``Human'' series of daily life erosion games developed by The Fourth Boundary. He will be in charge of one of the 40 rooms in the exhibition "TOKYOROOMS Exhibition - 40 Rooms, 40 Ways of Living" which will be held during the same period.

This work is a survival horror game set in post-apocalyptic Korea, and is said to have been influenced by survival horror games of yesteryear.

entries.description: D4 Enterprises today began distributing ``EGG Console Seesaw MSX''. "Seesaw" is an ACT game released in 1985. The player controls the main character, JUN, and fights against the Warugaki group. JUN can only jump, so the key to winning is making full use of the seesaws and trampolines set up on the stage.

entries.title: 新作アドベンチャーMOBA「Golden Tides」に対し，KRAFTONらが350万ドルを出資。“次世代のMOBA”として期待が高まる

entries.description: PsychedelicGames has announced that it has received a total of $3.5 million (approximately 555 million yen) in investment from Korean publisher KRAFTON, esports organization FlyQuest, and game investment company Arbitrum Gaming Ventures for its new game "Golden Tides", which is currently in development. The funds will be used to expand the development of this game and build an ecosystem.

entries.description: Register today released the downloadable title ``If it doesn't work, press it'' for Nintendo Switch. It's a puzzle adventure game where you aim to escape from a mysterious room with countless buttons. The game combines horror elements, where if you press too many buttons, your ``sanity'' decreases.

The player controls Rec, a robot that records and plays back the player's movements, and collects scattered musical notes in a mysterious world ruled by machines.

entries.description: MIXI's investment subsidiary MIXIGlobal Investments today (April 2, 2026) announced ``LVL Zero Tokyo,'' which supports the overseas expansion of indie game developers. entries.description: PoldenPublishing today announced the PC game "Salty Dog" developed by CrossbridgeGameStudios. This is a cooperative 2D action game in which dog divers explore the deep sea. Using physical calculations, the game uses a harpoon to retrieve treasures and creatures on the ocean floor. The items you bring back can be exchanged for cash and used to upgrade your submarine.

entries.description: The "Vertical Reading Manga Award," a manga award for vertically scrolling manga organized by Comic Natalie, was held for the second time, and "Konzei wa toushu ni naru naru" won first place in the overseas works category at the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025. In this reincarnation fantasy, the main character, Florentia, wakes up as a seven-year-old girl and struggles to protect her beloved father and her family, which is doomed to destruction. At the award ceremony for the "Tate-omi Manga Award 2025," guest judge Pate-chan and other panelists commented on the work as "exhilarating in its revenge and at the same time heartwarming (to see a child trying her best). To commemorate the first place award in the foreign works category, we conducted an e-mail interview with Mon, the artist in charge of drawing, about such "Konzei ha Toushi ni naru Naru" (This World Will Be Our Lord). We asked him about the story behind the creation of the beloved protagonist, saying, "I sometimes feel as if I am lovingly raising the child together with the readers.

entries.title: 「タテ読みマンガアワード 2025」国内作品部門1位受賞記念 「お求めいただいた暴君陛下の悪女です」天壱メールインタビュー
entries.title_ja: 「タテ読みマンガアワード 2025」国内作品部門1位受賞記念 「お求めいただいた暴君陛下の悪女です」天壱メールインタビュー
entries.description: The "Vertical Reading Manga Award," a manga award for vertically scrolling manga organized by Comic Natalie, was held for the second time, and "It's the Tyrant's Bad Girl You Asked For" won first place in the domestic works category. The work is a story of romance and revenge that begins when Lars, despised as an evil woman by her homeland, gets a chance to return to the past and start her life over a second time. Yudai Sano of INI, who participated in the "Vertical Reading Manga Award 2025" as a guest judge, said, "Every time there is revenge, the exhilaration is amazing. To commemorate winning first place in the domestic works category for "It's the Tyrant His Majesty's Bad Girl You Asked For," we conducted an e-mail interview with Tenichi, who is in charge of the original story and scenario. We asked him about his thoughts on the award and the source of the idea for the revenge scene.

The details of the collaboration event and the timing of the event have not been disclosed, but the scenario will be written by Ryogo Narita, the author of the original story.

entries.title: ARG「残置物展」を書籍化した「小説 残置物展」，5月29日に発売決定。全国残置物保管協会の会員と一緒にいわく付きの村に足を踏み入れる

entries.description: Daishi Boundary today announced that it will release on May 29 a book version of its ARG "Zanmono Exhibition," which displays leftover items from coin-operated lockers, titled "Novel Zanmono Exhibition. The price is 1980 yen (tax included). The protagonist of the novel version is an ordinary college student. By chance, he meets a woman called "Nucky" and is invited to join the National Association for the Preservation of Leftover Objects.

This time, Premium Digital DX of the action RPG "Kairan Makaisumu" is on sale for the first time at 25% off. In addition, "Kazenraiki 5" and "The Puppet Princess of Marl's Kingdom 25thANNIVERSARYCOLLECTION" are also available at a discounted price.

entries.description: Indie development studio ALDAMAMIGAMES will release its new title, "The Cursed Blood Doctor," as early access on March 31, 2026. Combining elements of the Cthulhu Mythos with deck-building and hand-drawn visuals inspired by medieval medicine, the game depicts an eerie world.

entries.title: 元AAAタイトル開発者が手がける協力型アクションRPG「Wyldheart」発表。途中参加や退出のしやすさにも配慮した，遊びやすさ重視のタイトル

entries.description: WayfinderStudios announced the March 27, 2026 release of Wyldheart, a cooperative action RPG. The game, created by a former AAA title developer, will allow players to join and leave the game easily, and will also allow solo play, making it a title that can be played regardless of individual schedules.

entries.description: Ponos announced today that its smartphone application "Nyanko Taisen" has been downloaded a total of 111.11 million times, and the first event to commemorate this milestone has begun. In addition, a limited time rare gacha "DL Commemorative Selection Gacha" is being held to increase the appearance rate of legendary rares.

The limited time-only "Cotton Fruit Galaxy" flavor, which is inspired by the world of the work, and other items will be on sale.

entries.title: マーベルのレトロ名作が現代に蘇る。「MARVEL MaXimum Collection」配信開始。メーカーの壁を越えた複数タイトルのバンドルパックが日本語対応で登場

entries.description: On March 27, 2026, LimitedRunGames released the MARVELMaXimumCollection, a comprehensive collection of popular Marvel Comics titles. The bundle includes 13 versions of six games that were popular in arcades and 8-bit/16-bit home consoles in the 1990s, including "SilverSurfer" and "X-Men: TheArcadeGame.

entries.title: ランダムグッズに関する消費者の意識調査をHamaru Strategyが実施中。集計結果は一般公開を予定

entries.description: On March 28, 2026, HamaruStrategy launched a survey on consumer attitudes toward random goods. Responses will be accepted until 11:59 p.m. on April 3, but will be closed when the system's upper limit of 100,000 responses is reached. The themes of the survey include experiences of purchasing random goods, likes/dislikes, tolerance levels, related troubles, and improvement measures.

This time, it was revealed that the first Warframe to walk on all four limbs, VorunaPrime, will be implemented and that the 14th Prelude of Soulframe will be released for PC in April.

entries.description: Today's "Almost Daily Indie PickUp!" introduces "CiniCross," a roguelite puzzle game that incorporates nonograms into dungeon exploration. The game is about solving puzzles, defeating enemies, and collecting artifacts to reach the depths of a cursed dungeon, bringing the urgent elements of "time" and "life" into the nonogram to offer a completely new play experience.

entries.title: AnimeJapan 2026（アニメジャパン）新情報まとめ　「レイアース」キャスト発表、「スティール・ボール・ラン」配信情報ほか

entries.description: AnimeJapan 2026, one of the world's largest anime events, was held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo on March 28 and 29, 2026. The following is a summary of new information announced at the event, including anime adaptation information, key visuals, PVs, broadcast dates, and casts, as well as a report on the event stages held at the venue.

entries.title: 「葬送のフリーレン」種﨑敦美がヒンメル視点に感謝、小林千晃は三木眞一郎に喰らいつく

entries.description: The talk stage of the TV anime "Sougou no Freelen" written by Yamada Kaneto and Abetsukasa, "Sougou no Freelen" 2nd season special stage AnimeJapan 2026" was held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo today, March 29, during "AnimeJapan 2026". Atsumi Tanezaki (Freelen), Kana Ichinose (Fern), and Chiaki Kobayashi (Stark) appeared on stage. As a surprise, Shinichiro Miki, who plays the role of the divine Revolte, took the stage.

entries.title: 「青ブタ」完結を前に石川界人の愛が炸裂「この役、誰にも譲りたくない！」

entries.description: A stage event for the theatrical anime "Seishun Butajyaku ha Deer Friend no Yume Mieru" was held today, March 29, at AnimeJapan 2026, which is being held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo. The event featured Kaito Ishikawa playing the role of Sakita Azukawa, Asami Seto playing the role of Mai Sakurajima, Ki Yamane playing the role of Ikumi Akagi, and Mainaka Ishimi playing the role of Miori Mihigashi.

entries.description: A talk event for the TV anime "Marriage Toxin," written by Vein and Mizuki Yoda, took place today, March 29, at AnimeJapan 2026, held at Tokyo Big Sight in Tokyo, Japan.

entries.description: The stage event of the TV anime "AKANE BANJI" written by Hiroki Suenaga and Takamasa Umagami, titled "Dondokoi! Brothers' Meeting" was held on March 28 at AnimeJapan 2026, featuring Anna Nagase as Akeon Sakurazaki, Nobunaga Shimazaki as Mairuke Araragawa, Chiaki Kobayashi as Koguma Araragawa, Yohei Azaue as Toruji Araragawa, and Seiichiro Yamashita as Guriko Araragawa.

entries.description: A stage event for the TV anime "Kindergarten WARS," written by Yusei Chiba, was held today, March 29, at the WHITE STAGE in AnimeJapan 2026. Atsumi Tanezaki, who plays Rita, and Kentaro Kumagai, who plays Doug, took the stage at the event. Also appearing as guests were Hitomi Owada who plays Hana, Satoshi Hino who plays Luke, and Mariya Ise who plays Sylvia, all of whom were announced to appear at the event on the same day.

The final episode will be distributed free of charge on the "ABEMA Anime Channel" from 11:30 a.m. on March 28, simultaneously with terrestrial broadcasting and at the fastest speed on the Web.

The game is an architectural simulation game in which players create their own ideal rooftop by arranging buildings and props from an empty space.

entries.description: CE-Asia today launched the free DLC "Eirene and the War Crucible" for the action RPG "AILIMIT Infinite Kihei". This DLC depicts the story after the ending of the main story and begins a new journey to the northern parish in a world after the collapse of the church. In addition, "Boss Retry" and "Boss Rush" modes have been implemented, and the main game has been updated.

entries.title: ［インタビュー］岸田メル氏が“ブルリフ”でやり残したこと。シリーズ集大成となる「BLUE REFLECTION Quartet」で，目指すところを聞いてきた

entries.description: The "BLUEREFLECTION" series features transparent girls drawn by Mel Kishida. BLUEREFLECTIONQuartet," a compilation of the series, has been announced. The anime and apps have been reconstructed as a console game, and all of them have been put together in a single title. We asked Mel Kishida, the game's supervisor, about it.

This is a "professional baseball cheering card game" that combines "professional baseball," "breaking baseball news," and "card battles," and all the actual professional baseball games are broadcast live via Fami-Star View and AI-based audio.

entries.description: LogoiGames today (March 27, 2026) released a beta branch of the Japanese version of "DolocTown," currently available in early access on Steam. The game is a farm simulation game centered on DolocTown, a town left behind in a post-apocalyptic world, in which players build farms, grow crops, and construct attractive buildings to revitalize the town.

entries.description: PlayWithFurcifer today released version 1.1, a major free update to its deck-building rogue-lite competitive game, Backpack Battle. This update introduces a new class, the "Engineer," which is based around the "Charge" class. It also implements a new mode called "Switch Mode," in which players switch bags with their opponents at the end of each round.

entries.description: ForkliftInteractive announced on March 26, 2026 that "TheSpotter:DigorDie," a new title in development by PuppyroarGames, will be released on Steam on April 7. The game is a mining and tower defense game in which players defend an abandoned gas station while collecting resources in a zombie apocalypse world infested with a large number of mutants.

entries.description: Plott and Namco Bandai Entertainment today released a teaser video for "Tengu Tousen," a short animation jointly produced by the two companies, on their official YouTube channel. Based on the concept of "royal battles and Japanese-style sword fights," the film depicts the battles between "Tengu," monsters born from the malice of humans, and "sword punishers," who fight against them.

entries.description: DJI has announced its latest drone, the DJI Avata 360, which will go on sale in April. The price is 77,330 yen for the main unit alone. The "DJI Avata 360 (with DJI RC 2)" set with transmitter is priced at 116,380 yen. The "DJI Avata 360 Fly More Combo (with DJI RC 2)," which includes the transmitter, three batteries, and charging hub, is priced at 159,830 yen. The Motion Fly More Combo, which includes the DJI Goggles N3 goggles and the DJI RC Motion 3 motion controller, will be 162,140 yen.

The award ceremony was held today, March 26, at the small hall of Hamarikyu Asahi Hall in Tokyo, and Kohei Asai, the editor in charge of the manga, attended the ceremony on behalf of Kojima. The presenter was Kiko Sono, who won the Grand Prize last time for "Alice, Even to the Universe," and Naoki Yoshida served as MC.

In the video, Noah's sidekick, Key, an AI assistant, explains the information players need to know in order to survive in the main game.

The game is an HD-2D side-scrolling ADV in which the story progresses through puzzle solving and deduction. Players use their characters' special abilities to gather clues, organize information, and get closer to the truth of the case.

The following is a report on the award ceremony, where "Urban Legend Dismantling Center," "NintendoSwitch2," and the movie "Exit 8" were selected for the Excellence Award among game-related contents.

This time, a total of 10 characters will participate in the game, eight of whom appeared in the previous "Cotton Rock 'n' Roll" game, plus two additional characters, for a total of 16 stages to conquer.

entries.title: 「ホロライブ」初の公式スマホゲームアプリ「hololive Dreams」，事前登録が50万人を突破。100万人達成で「ドットサングラス」をプレゼント

entries.description: QualiArts announced today that the number of pre-registrations for "hololiveDreams," a smartphone application being developed in collaboration with Cover, has exceeded 500,000. To commemorate this milestone, a "special truck" with designs of each of the 54 talents appearing in the app will be operated in multiple cities in Japan and abroad.

entries.title: デスゲームで協力を提案される短編ADV「SP(L/R)ITE：スプライト」，4月9日にリリース。異空間に浮かぶ部屋からの脱出を目指す
entries.title_ja: デスゲームで協力を提案される短編ADV「SP(L/R)ITE：スプライト」，4月9日にリリース。異空間に浮かぶ部屋からの脱出を目指す
entries.description: WakuWaku Games today announced that its new title "SP(L/R)ITE: Sprite" will be released on April 9. This title is a short adventure game in which the player aims to escape from a room floating in a different space. A stone statue "Acreada," who claims to be the goddess of fate, forces you to play a death game of escape, but your neighbor "Gene," who lives behind the wall, offers to help you.

entries.title: 宇宙の深淵を舞台にするシネマティックADV「Directive 8020」，PS5 Proトレイラーを公開。高精細でリアルなグラフィックスを確認できる

entries.description: SupermassiveGames has released the latest trailer for its cinematic ADV "Directive8020," which shows realistic graphics that take advantage of the PS5Pro's performance. The video introduces ray tracing, lighting effects, smoother facial expressions and animation processing. An introduction trailer of the player characters was also released.

entries.title: 「World of Tanks:HEAT」，10対10のコンクエストや5対5のハードポイントなど，4つのゲームモードを紹介する映像が公開に

entries.description: Wargaming today (March 26, 2026) released the third episode of "Foundation," a series of videos on the game's official YouTube channel that showcases the appeal of the WorldofTanks:HEAT title currently in development. In this video, four game modes are introduced. The maps that appear in the game are based on real locations.

entries.description: BeholdStudios today (March 26, 2026) released a developer blog for its new title in development, DeepDishDungeon, and announced that it will be available in multiple languages, including Japanese. The latest trailer was shown at the recent FutureGamesShow, where it was revealed that the game will be released in the fall of 2026.

entries.title: 「MotoGP 26」，ゲームプレイトレイラーを公開。晴天や雨天など多彩なコンディションでのレースを，さまざまな視点から確認できる

entries.description: On March 25, 2026, Milestone released a gameplay trailer for MotoGP26. In the video, you can check out the races in various conditions, such as sunny and rainy, from various perspectives. Check out the riders' movements that reflect the new physics model and the detailed graphics.

entries.title: 罪深い魂を罰して地獄の繁栄を目指す経営シミュレーション「Sintopia」，日本時間の4月17日にSteamでリリース

entries.description: Team17 announced today (March 25, 2026) that its new title "Sintopia" will be released on April 17, 2026 Japan time. In this dark comedy-style strategy and management simulation game, players take on the role of an administrator who controls the bureaucratic system of Hell, and leads a group of minions called "Employees" under his command to make Hell prosper.

entries.description: FangamerJapan released a remake of OFF on March 26, 2026. OFF is a free-to-play game by creator MortisGhost that has influenced many other games. The remake version includes an updated battle system, new areas and bosses, and other additional elements.

entries.description: Pokémon will release a NintendoSwitch version of its new title "PokémonChampions" on April 8, 2026. Although some information, such as the battle format, has been disclosed, there are still many aspects of this title that are shrouded in mystery. A preliminary trial event was held for the media prior to the release of the game, and we will report on the event.

It is said to be the company's "next challenge," and there are high expectations for what it will be. The photo seems to be some kind of hardware, but only the company logo "ZUIKI" can be seen, and no details have been revealed.

The total number of participants is 279,484, and the maximum number of simultaneous connections on Steam is 37,000. An "infographic video" summarizing statistics during the test period is also available.

We report on the appeal of this new type of sports game.

entries.title: 「Destiny 2」恒例の期間限定イベント「ガーディアン・ゲーム」を開催。「マジック：ザ・ギャザリング」コラボで限定アイテムも登場

entries.description: Bungie today launched its annual limited-time "Guardian Games" event in the online action RPG "Destiny 2. This year's event is also a collaboration with "Magic: The Gathering," with armor decorations and various cosmetic items themed on the world of the game.

entries.title: オープンワールドRPG「Wartales」，大型拡張パック第2弾「Fires in the Capital」を発表。首都イサンドリンや新クラス「放火魔」などを追加
entries.title_ja: オープンワールドRPG「Wartales」，大型拡張パック第2弾「Fires in the Capital」を発表。首都イサンドリンや新クラス「放火魔」などを追加
entries.description: ShiroGames has announced that the second major expansion pack for its open-world RPG Wartales, FiresintheCapital, will be released during April 2026. The new capital city of Isandrine will be added to the game, and will involve various political forces in the city, including the Teaching Sacred Order and the Rebel Army. In addition, a new class, the Arsonist, will be added, centered on the use of fire.

entries.title: 「コンソールアーカイブス テラクレスタ」，3月26日配信。1986年にニチブツから8ビット家庭用ゲーム機向けに発売された縦スクロールSTG
entries.title_ja: 「コンソールアーカイブス テラクレスタ」，3月26日配信。1986年にニチブツから8ビット家庭用ゲーム機向けに発売された縦スクロールSTG
entries.description: Hamster announced today that it will begin distributing "Console Archive Terra Cresta" on March 26. Terra Cresta" is a vertical scrolling STG released by Nichibutsu in 1986 for 8-bit home video game consoles. The player's ship can combine with allied parts to make formation attacks, and the formation can be switched depending on the combination.

entries.title: 「クロノ・トリガー」を彩る64曲を収録したアナログレコードBOXが本日発売。楽曲をMP3形式で入手できるコードも封入

entries.description: Square Enix released today (March 25, 2026) the music product "ChronoTriggerOriginalSoundtrackVinylLPBox". This product is a 4-LP box set containing 64 original soundtracks from the company's RPG "Chrono Trigger".

entries.title: 「トモダチコレクション わくわく生活」，体験版を本日サプライズ配信。小さな島の管理人となり，最大3人までの「Mii」たちの生活を見守れる

entries.description: Nintendo today (March 25, 2026) began distributing a demo version of "Tomodachi Collection Wakuwaku Seikatsu" for NintendoSwitch, which the company plans to release on April 16. The demo version allows users to create up to three Mii and see how they live their lives on a small island.

entries.title: ウルトラ怪獣・ゼットンのホームランダービーゲーム「ゼットンの1兆度ホームラン競争」が公開に。ブラウザから無料プレイ可能

entries.description: Tsuburaya Productions today (March 25, 2026) released the baseball game "Zetton's 1 Trillion Degree Home Run Race". The game can be played for free from a browser. This is a so-called "home run derby" game in which players try to hit back the trillion-degree fireballs thrown by the Ultra monster Zetton.

Some stores of Amiami and Kotobukiya are planning to start pre-sales from April 28th, and will also offer purchase benefits.

entries.title: 「18TRIP」ライブイベント「HAMAツアーズpresents “おもてなしライブ” -Sparkle-」♯01レポート。デュオ曲から新曲まで，観客を魅了した一夜

entries.title: 骨董品の売買とタロット占いが経営を左右する。ローグライクストラテジー「Fortune Seller」，2026年4月6日に発売

entries.description: Indie development studio Kiwick has announced that its new roguelike strategy "FortuneSeller" will be released on April 6, 2026. The theme of the game is the management of an antique store, combining the buying and selling of antiques and the effects of tarot cards to create synergy. The game also supports Japanese-language display.

entries.description: NTT DOCOMO today released a free browser game "Influencer Nurturing Game Bakumore" on its official website. The game is a simulation game in which you, as a high school girl dreaming of becoming an influencer, increase your followers by posting on SNS. The game has educational and horror elements, and allows players to learn about the risks of leaking personal information that lurk in the photos they post.

This fantasy ADV depicts the fateful encounter and adventures of a girl, Fuka, who searches for her missing brother, and a mage crime investigator, Iris, in present-day Shibuya. An original ASMR drama will also be distributed on the same day.

Amiami News covered this event on March 19 (Thu), before it was open to the public, at KOTOBUKIYA-Hall from March 21 (Sat) to 22 (Sun), 2026.

entries.description: Namco Bandai Entertainment Inc. has announced that it will release "Digimon UP," a new game in the "Digimon" series, an RPG for smartphones, within 2026, and has released a logo and a teaser trailer. The official site has already been opened, and various Digimon elements will appear in the game.

entries.description: Pre-registration is now open for "Cat and Soup - Magic Recipes," a smartphone application that will be a sequel to "Cat and Soup. The art style and atmosphere of the previous title is said to be maintained, while offering new gameplay that can be enjoyed by both fans of the previous title and new players.

entries.description: On March 18, Square Enix and GoogleCloud held a press briefing on the use of generative AI in the game industry, during which "Dragon Quest X's" interactive AI buddy "Sulamy" was announced. How will AI be used in the game industry? Here is a report on the briefing by Square Enix and GoogleCloud.

The final stage greeting" was held at TOHO Cinemas Hibiya in Tokyo on March 21, with Kikunosuke Toya as Denji, Shogo Sakata as Aki Hayakawa, Hanabayashi Takahashi as Kobeni Higashiyama, and Rena Ueda as Reze on stage.

Yusuke Kobayashi as Senku Ishigami, Goshi Suzuki as Ryusui Nanami and Seiichiro Yamashita as SAI took the stage.

entries.description: The crane game, with its simple mechanism of manipulating an arm inside a box to drop a prize, has an indescribable appeal. The game is a casual adventure game in which the main character, a black cat who has become separated from her owner, wanders around an open-world city, trying to return home.

entries.title: 『KPOPガールズ! デーモン・ハンターズ』はUEのリアルタイムレンダリングで高品質の3Dシーンを実現。Epic Gamesが制作インタビュー記事を公開

entries.description:
3D Animated Film "KPOP Girls! Interview with the production team about the use of UE in "Demon Hunters," published by Epic Games.
UE's real-time rendering enables highly accurate pre-visualization. As a specific example, a case study of a battle scene in a public bathhouse created with Volumetric is presented.
The article also discusses efforts to automate the workflow of importing animation rigs created in Maya into UE.

Bundle of sound data distributed free of charge in conjunction with the Game Developer Conference.

entries.description:
March 17, 2026 (local time), the official release of Blender 5.1
Bone Info, an Input node that allows users to obtain transformation information from bones in armatures, has been added to the Geometry node.
Improved processing speed of shape keys and actions, and enhanced grease pencil fill functionality have also been implemented.

Enhanced color selection function and UI/UX improvements were also added.

entries.title: UE5のレンダリング・最適化手法や『Battlefield 6』開発事例など。グラフィックス技術のカンファレンス「GPC 2025」、一部講演の資料・アーカイブ動画が公開

entries.description:

Presentation materials are available for 30 lectures, including lectures on rendering and optimization techniques using Unreal Engine 5 and Cycles, the standard Blender renderer.
Eight archived videos are now available. including a lecture on "Battlefield 6" development case study.

Ishibashi, who plays Gai, and Takuya Sato, who plays Sasuke, took the stage at the TOKYO MX booth stage to look back on the first season and talk about their expectations for the second season, which will start airing and distributing in July. In this article, we will introduce the two "hot and crazy" stages.

Just before the broadcast, a special visual newly drawn by Studio Kafka, the production company, has been released. In addition, the ending theme will be "Oath" by Leina, and the third trailer featuring the song has been unveiled. Additional cast members including Keno Horiuchi, Shuichiro Umeda, Shunsuke Sakino, and Ayumi Murase have also been announced.

entries.description:
The movie version of "Detective Conan: Jolly Roger in the Azure Coffin" will be available for unlimited viewing on DMM TV from March 28 onward and on U-NEXT from late March.
It will also be available on Hulu and Amazon Prime Video.
Highlights of the treasure hunt suspense in which the friendship between Ran and Sonoko shines will also be explained.

Detective Conan: Quarter of Silence" will be available on DMM TV from March 28, and on U-NEXT from late March for unlimited viewing.
It will also be available on Hulu and Amazon.
Highlights of the 15-minute time-limit suspense set in the snowy mountains will also be explained.

The movie version of "Detective Conan: Full Score of Fear" will be available on DMM TV after March 28, and on U-NEXT from late March for unlimited viewing.
